commits: 7ff8613: docs(0.5.1): STORE-seam design memo (bucketed µ$ seam + FIX-1 child wiring)
ed01d44: test(0.5.1): RED — bucketed µ$ spend seam, checkpoint, subprocess round-trip, breaker round-trip
a30a89b: feat(0.5.1): GREEN — DualCache spend seam (bucketed µ$, R5) + FIX-1 child checkpoint

targeted: tests/test_fast_spend_store.py (19 tests: R5 accuracy x2, integer-µ$ x2, TTL>=window, rolling-window, checkpoint semantics x7, subprocess round-trip, breaker round-trip x3, child-wiring x2)
tests.notes: 377 passed + 2 skipped across the affected suites (spend_store, fast_state, fast_monitor, fast_router, advisor_tools, routing_guardrails, proxy*, circuit_breaker*, phase3_smart). Full suite: 2125 passed, 73 skipped, 1 xpassed, 1 PRE-EXISTING unrelated failure (test_fathom_init.py::test_init_engine_with_fathomdb — requires the optional fathomdb 'db' extra not installed; the test's own comment notes it; untouched by this pack).

blockers_encountered.description: Pre-existing test tests/test_proxy.py::TestShutdownHandlers::test_sigterm_handler_checkpoints_circuit_breaker_state asserted the LAUNCHER SIGTERM handler writes cb_state.json — exactly the buggy launcher-side checkpoint that FIX-1 removes.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Rewrote it as test_sigterm_handler_does_not_checkpoint_state: the launcher flushes S3 but must NOT write cb_state.json (the litellm child is the single writer). In-scope (tests/ is in MODIFY).

blockers_encountered.description: `uv run pytest` used an ephemeral pytest without project deps (ModuleNotFoundError: dotenv). pytest lives in the optional 'test' extra (not 'dev').
blockers_encountered.resolution: Ran tests with `uv run --extra test pytest`. No code/config change; pyproject untouched.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: tests/test_proxy.py: updated one shutdown-handler test to the new FIX-1 contract (launcher no longer checkpoints).

tests/test_fast_spend_store.py: added TestChildCheckpointWiring (2 tests) proving monitor._checkpoint_child_state/_restore_child_state round-trip BOTH spend and breaker via AIRLOCK_STATE_DIR, plus the launcher gating contract.

dev/smoketest/run_isolated_instance.sh: added a `restart` subcommand (+ reap_port_listeners helper) that stops the launcher, reaps the orphaned litellm child holding the test port, and relaunches PRESERVING the runtime state dir.
agent_verify_result: pass (targeted: 377 passed, 2 skipped across affected suites; new file 19/19 + shutdown-handler test pass; 1 pre-existing unrelated fathomdb failure noted)
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.1-STORE-seam on branch feat/0.5.1-STORE-seam at a30a89bcfb1681fedb06df3d6ceb49060330790b; review, run the dev/smoketest restart-durability scenario on a separate dir+port, verify, merge.
